title: BG Electrical Single Wall Switch with LED Power Indicator, Double Pole, Raised and Slim Profile, Round Edges, Nexus Metal, Antique Brass, 20A, NAB31
features: DECORATIVE DOUBLE POLE SWITCH WITH RAISED PROFILE FROM THE BG NEXUS METAL RANGE: Slim, raised profile with softly rounded corners in antique brass, with colour matching fixing screws for a super-stylish design
INTEGRATED MOISTURE GASKET CONTROL: Protects the metal edges from tarnishing. Ideal when using new plaster. No visible plastic around the switches
FEATURES A FLUSH LED POWER INDICATOR: Which is visible when the switch is on. Ideal for boilers, water heaters and other fixed appliances. Minimum mounting box depth 25mm.

CAPTIVE BACKED-OUT TERMINAL SCREWS: Easy wire connection and terminal screws for fast installation and to prevent screw loss. All fixings included. Adheres to BS60669-1 regulations which ensures a safer electrical installation
BG ELECTRICAL 25 YEARS MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
